overall.description: Bus simulator gameplay showing first-person driving perspective from the driver's cabin during a heavy rainstorm in a European city. The bus navigates wet multi-lane streets, stops at traffic lights, and shares the road with cars and trucks while windshield wipers maintain visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road in heavy rain

events.description: approaching red traffic light and slowing to stop behind white sedan

agents.ego_description: driving bus on wet multi-lane road, approaching intersection and decelerating

bus driver instrument panel with multiple digital screens and controls
multi-story concrete residential buildings lining the right side of the street
row of green trees along the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a rain-soaked multi-lane urban road with windshield wipers sweeping continuously. Apartment buildings line the right side while trees border the left. The vehicle approaches a red traffic light and comes to a halt behind a white sedan.

events.description: bus comes to complete stop at red traffic light
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light behind a white sedan, waiting for signal change

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at red light directly ahead with brake lights illuminated
silver sedan stopped in adjacent lane to the right

entered.detail: right side rearview mirror showing reflection of traffic behind

segments.scene_description: The bus remains stationary at the red traffic light, positioned behind a white car with a silver sedan visible in the lane to the right. Rain continues to fall heavily, requiring constant wiper movement. The traffic light changes from red to green, signaling the resumption of travel.

events.description: bus accelerates from stop and proceeds through intersection
crossing through the intersection with traffic lights now behind

agents.ego_description: accelerating through green light and continuing down the wet road with tram tracks

notable_agents.action: white sedan moving ahead in the same lane through the intersection

entered.detail: metal tram rails embedded in the road surface running along the lane
traffic sign indicating lane restrictions on the left side

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates through the intersection as the light turns green, continuing along the wet asphalt. Tram tracks become visible embedded in the road surface. The vehicle maintains a steady pace behind the white sedan as it proceeds down the urban arterial.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane road with mixed traffic and parked vehicles

events.description: large delivery truck appears in the right lane and travels parallel

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed on multi-lane road, sharing space with large truck in adjacent lane

notable_agents.action: large delivery truck driving in parallel in the right lane

entered.detail: large box truck with trailer occupying the right lane
row of vehicles parked along the right curb

segments.scene_description: The bus travels alongside other traffic, including a large delivery truck that appears in the right lane and travels parallel for a time. Parked cars line the right side of the street. The windshield wipers continue sweeping across the glass as the bus maintains its forward progress through the rainy conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with parked cars and bus stop

events.description: passing through section with parked vehicles on both sides of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down wet urban street with reduced traffic density

entered.detail: covered bus stop structure with glass panels on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus continues down the urban street with reduced traffic density, passing parked vehicles on both sides of the road. A bus stop shelter becomes visible on the right sidewalk. The journey proceeds through the consistently wet and overcast environment with wipers maintaining visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin navigating a rain-soaked urban arterial that transitions from a congested intersection to a quieter city street. It begins with the vehicle gliding past apartment buildings and trees before coming to a halt behind a white sedan at a red traffic light. As the light shifts to green, the bus accelerates through the intersection, crossing over embedded tram tracks while following the lead car. The scene then expands to include a large delivery truck traveling parallel in the right lane amidst a line of parked cars, all while windshield wipers sweep continuously against the heavy downpour. Finally, the traffic density thins as the bus proceeds past a roadside shelter and parked vehicles under a consistently overcast sky.
